description: Bidirectional sync between AgentDash and HubSpot CRM. Syncs contacts, companies, deals, and activities. Agents can read customer context and log activities directly to HubSpot.

tools.name: hubspot_get_contact
tools.description: Retrieve a contact's details and recent activity from HubSpot

tools.name: hubspot_get_deal
tools.description: Retrieve deal details, stage, amount, and associated contacts

tools.name: hubspot_create_activity
tools.description: Log a note, email, call, or task to a HubSpot contact or deal

tools.name: hubspot_update_deal_stage
tools.description: Move a deal to a different pipeline stage in HubSpot

tools.name: hubspot_search_contacts
tools.description: Search for contacts by name, email, company, or custom properties

tools.name: hubspot_list_deals
tools.description: List deals in a pipeline stage with filtering and sorting

accessToken.title: HubSpot Private App Access Token (secret ref)
accessToken.description: Create a Private App in HubSpot Settings > Integrations > Private Apps

defaultPipelineId.title: Default Deal Pipeline ID
defaultPipelineId.description: HubSpot pipeline to sync deals from. Leave empty for all pipelines.

dealStageMapping.title: Deal Stage to Issue Status Mapping
dealStageMapping.description: Map HubSpot deal stages to iGotit issue statuses

autoCreateIssuesFromDeals.title: Auto-create issues when new deals are created

autoAssignAgentByDealType.title: Auto-assign agents based on deal properties
